clauses.heading: Preliminary
clauses.text: This Master Circular consolidates the directions issued to Investment Advisers registered with the Board and shall be read with the SEBI (Investment Advisers) Regulations, 2013.

clauses.heading: Applicability
clauses.text: The provisions of this circular apply to every person registered as an Investment Adviser and to every person carrying on the activity of providing investment advice for consideration.

clauses.heading: Definitions
clauses.text: For the purposes of this circular, 'client' means any person who receives investment advice for consideration, and 'fees' means the consideration charged for such advice in a financial year.

clauses.heading: Registration of Investment Advisers
clauses.text: No person shall act as an investment adviser or hold itself out as an investment adviser unless it has obtained a certificate of registration from the Board under these provisions.

clauses.heading: Threshold for registration
clauses.text: A person providing investment advice to 300 or more clients, or charging fees exceeding INR 3,00,00,000 (Rupees three crore) in a financial year, must apply for registration as a non-individual investment adviser.

clauses.heading: Application timeline
clauses.text: An investment adviser who crosses the threshold specified in clause 3.1 shall submit a complete application for registration within 30 days of crossing such threshold.

clauses.heading: Conduct of Business
clauses.text: Every investment adviser shall act in a fiduciary capacity towards its clients and shall maintain an arm's length relationship between its advisory and any distribution activities.

clauses.heading: Disclosure of fees
clauses.text: An investment adviser must disclose to the client, in writing and before charging any fee, the complete fee schedule including the basis of computation and any conflicts of interest.

clauses.heading: Client-level segregation
clauses.text: An investment adviser must not provide both advisory and distribution services to the same client, and shall maintain client-level segregation of advisory and distribution at all times.

clauses.heading: Records and Reporting
clauses.text: Every investment adviser shall maintain records of investment advice provided and interactions with clients in a manner that supports audit and inspection by the Board.

clauses.heading: Record retention
clauses.text: An investment adviser must retain all records of investment advice, client agreements, and risk profiling for a period of 5 years from the date of the relevant interaction.

clauses.heading: Client notification duty
clauses.text: An investment adviser must notify each affected client in writing within 7 days of any material change to the fee structure, conflicts of interest, or the adviser's registration status.
